title: cichlanthus chinensis
intro: Cichlanthus chinensis, also known as Chinese cichorium or Cichorium intybus, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, but naturalized in other parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cichlanthus chinensis include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Cichlanthus chinensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
